title: ZHENG QI — AI + Design + Human Factors
source_name: follow-builders cloud fallback / keyword search / Anysearch
full_text:
About me
I hold a master’s degree from Tsinghua University, specializing in Urban Human Factors Engineering and AI‑driven design systems. My work explores how artificial intelligence, data science, and human experience converge to build intelligent environments and creative tools that understand people — not just data.
As the Co‑founder & COO of AlloTech, an AI platform for generative manufacturing design, I lead cross‑functional teams combining algorithmic modeling, data engineering, and product design. My broader research investigates how human factors principles can shape the next generation of AI‑driven urban and digital systems.
My journey moves between research, entrepreneurship, and design — from conducting large‑scale data analysis at ByteDance and Meituan to leading projects that merge machine learning with spatial cognition. Outside the studio, I find balance in mountain hiking and outdoor exploration, where I draw inspiration for resilient design thinking.
Tsinghua University
Beijing, China
Master of Architecture – Urban Human Factors Engineering
Sep. 2023 – Jun. 2025
• GPA: 3.91/4.0 | Rank: 24/120
Tianjin University
Tianjin, China
Bachelor of Architecture and Urban Planning
Sep. 2018 – Jun. 2023
• GPA: 3.9/4.0 | Rank: 1/186
Explore My Work →
Professional Experience & Research
Leading AI-driven innovation across industry and academia
Professional Experience
Co-founder & COO, AlloTech
2025 – Present | AI-Driven Design-to-Manufacture Platform
Leading a generative AI platform that automates manufacturable design generation, integrating geometry encoding, multimodal diffusion models, and constraint optimization.
NVIDIA Inception
MIT AI Venture Studio
¥2.1M Seed Funding
Data Scientist, ByteDance
2024 | LBS Prediction & A/B Experiment Design
Developed ML pipelines for location-based behavior prediction and experimentation optimization across >100M samples.
ML Engineer, Meituan
2024 | SFT & RLHF Data Optimization
Fine-tuned large language models with advanced data cleaning and bias reduction techniques, improving dataset quality by 12%.
Research Projects
Urban Perception Analysis
Tianjin Metro Areas | 2023
Semantic segmentation on 30,000+ street-view images for environmental indicator extraction.
Human Factors in Green Office Design
Xiong'an Project | 2023
AI-adaptive environmental regulation based on behavioral and emotional measurement models.
Selected Works
AI × Design × Human Factors
VIBE CREATING
AI-Driven Manufacturable Design Platform
2025.05 - Present · Co-founder & COO
Text-to-CAD
MCP toolchains
3D assembly automation
URBAN PULSE
Metro Station Environmental Assessment
2022.08 - 2023.03 · Researcher & Designer

GIS metrics
Individual work
HOMES BY AI
Automated Housing Generation
2025.03 - 2025.07 · Algorithm & System Lead
3D spatial reasoning
JSON geometry grammar
VISUAL SYMPHONY
The Concrete Forms of Music in Vienna
2024.01 - 2024.07 · Researcher & Designer
Music-spectrum-driven geometry
Generative structures
Individual work
View Full Portfolio →
Leadership & Venture
AlloTech | Co‑founder & COO
2025 – Present
At AlloTech, I lead strategy, data infrastructure, and product development, translating cutting‑edge AI models into scalable tools for real‑world design.
Supervise data teams developing multimodal geometry‑learning pipelines
Coordinate collaboration across engineering, design, and ML research
Manage product deployment, fundraising, and research partnerships
Achievements
Selected for NVIDIA Inception and MIT AI Venture Studio
Raised ¥2.1M Seed Funding
Featured in early‑stage manufacturing AI showcases
Leadership Beyond Work
Previously Student Union President and Football Team Captain, leading multidisciplinary teams toward shared goals. Outside of work, I am a mountain hiker and long‑distance runner — exploring resilience, balance, and clarity.
Leading cross-functional teams at AlloTech
Finding balance through mountain hiking and exploration

## full_text

About me
I hold a master’s degree from Tsinghua University, specializing in Urban Human Factors Engineering and AI‑driven design systems. My work explores how artificial intelligence, data science, and human experience converge to build intelligent environments and creative tools that understand people — not just data.
As the Co‑founder & COO of AlloTech, an AI platform for generative manufacturing design, I lead cross‑functional teams combining algorithmic modeling, data engineering, and product design. My broader research investigates how human factors principles can shape the next generation of AI‑driven urban and digital systems.
My journey moves between research, entrepreneurship, and design — from conducting large‑scale data analysis at ByteDance and Meituan to leading projects that merge machine learning with spatial cognition. Outside the studio, I find balance in mountain hiking and outdoor exploration, where I draw inspiration for resilient design thinking.
